creator: bhughes@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 152134
Patch to update awscli and dependencies to latest versions

Attached is a patch (as a git commit) to upgrade devel/awscli and devel/py-botocore to the latest release versions.

devel/py-six has been removed as a runtime dependency, see https://github.com/boto/botocore/commit/3cf6dbc0365135b22e92f2da58e3fbf0d007e080
